scenario.name: UAS with MD5+SHA256 auth challenge
scenario.send: SIP/2.0 401 Unauthorized [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] WWW-Authenticate: Digest realm="testrealm@host.com", nonce="dcd98b7102dd2f0e8b11d0f600bfb0c093", algorithm=MD5, qop="auth", opaque="5ccc069c403ebaf9f0171e9517f40e41" WWW-Authenticate: Digest realm="testrealm@host.com", nonce="ZaGxV2WhsCtREI2EsiD1LR0RYd", algorithm=SHA-256, qop="auth", opaque="5ccc069c403ebaf9f0171e9517f40e42" Content-Length: 0
